{{CargoRelic
|name=Book of Nuevosken
|class_id=20722
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=The Book of Nuevosken is a book that systematically introduces magical knowledge. It provides a detailed classification of various magic and explains the principles and history of magic drawing, spells, prayers, incantations, and magic circles in an easy-to-understand manner. It is a necessary textbook for students at the Hogton Wizardry School...
|fame=15
|art=14
|fth=31
|civ=17
|tech=13
|ss1=Per 50 Arcanium used, Snail HP +20<br>Per 50 Arcanium used, Snail ATK +2<br>Arcanium used: 2000/2000
|ss2=Per 50 Arcanium used, Snail HP +40<br>Per 50 Arcanium used, Snail ATK +4<br>Arcanium used: 2000/2000
|ss3=Per 50 Arcanium used, Snail HP +60<br>Per 50 Arcanium used, Snail ATK +6<br>Arcanium used: 2000/2000
|ss4=Per 50 Arcanium used, Snail HP +60<br>Per 50 Arcanium used, Snail ATK +6<br>Arcanium used: 2000/2000
|ss7=Per 50 Arcanium used, Snail HP +60<br>Per 50 Arcanium used, Snail ATK +6<br>Arcanium used: 2000/2000<br> (Awakened)
}}
